Items.Title: Today’s Papers – Italy supports Ancelotti against Haaland, Chalobah intrigue
Items.Description: La Gazzetta dello Sport Mbappé won’t let Messi go He scores from the spot his 7th goal and beats Paraguay. He’ll face Morocco, who crushed Canada. Ancelotti, beware of Haaland’s wave. Kane, there’s the Azteca. Milan: Amorim lands and brings Gila, deal almost done Inter: Chalobah intrigue with Como. There’s Khalaili beforeCorriere dello Sport Mbappé style, everyone with Carlo France beat Paraguay (1-0), Kylian decides it from the spot: 7th goal. Ounahi eliminates Canada (3-0). Vinicius and Cunha to the assault of Norway at 22:00. Kolo-Juve: PSG insist on the price Carnevali offers 35m; Campos wants the 55m that the ex-CEO Comolli had proposed. Rentless Inter: Khalaili and Chalobah Moving forward for the Union SG wing-back, Como retire from the race for the Chelsea defender. Greenwood, Ryan’s signature arrives Roma’s sprint: today or tomorrow the green light for the 45m offer to Marseille Napoli, Allegri wants to see them Max will make his assessments: the market is put on hold for now: Hull City eye Milinkovic-SavicTuttosport ‘I’m done with the stadium.’ Marco Basoccu tells us about the Turin derby drama The prosecutor has asked for house arrest for the policeman who “hit him with tear gas, thrown in an inappropriate way.” The Juventus fan: “I understood it from witnesses, it could have happened to anyone. I’m too shocked, no more games.” Galliani: “Carnevali is completing a deal, but I won’t say which one.” D’Aversa: “An interrupted love story with Toro.” Carlo, Haaland wants to make it again… In the 2019 Champions League, it was a nightmare for his Napoli against City, but Ancelotti is not afraid and charges Vinicius. Neymar still on the bench. Mexico and Quinones: watch out, Kane. The altitude, the 80,000 fans at the Azteca and the “Colombian” hitman: so many risks Morocco dreams, now they are scary Double Ounahi and Rahimi: among the top eight again, but there’s concern for Salibari

Items.Title: Unbeaten in 34 matches - why Morocco are World Cup contenders
Items.Description: As  Morocco beat Canada to book their place in the last-8, their World Cup campaign can no longer be seen as a fairytale.

Items.Title: Morocco knock out World Cup co-hosts Canada to reach last eight
Items.Description: Azzedine Ounahi scored a double before Soufiane Rahimi added a third to knock out World Cup co-hosts Canada and send Morocco into the last eight thanks to a 3-0 win in Houston.
